expectations.text: Uses Zod or equivalent schema for response parsing
expectations.evidence: No schema library used. Hand-written User interface (lines 5-10). No runtime validation of API response.

expectations.text: Type derived from schema (z.infer or equivalent), not a hand-written interface
expectations.evidence: Line 5: interface User { ... } is hand-written. No schema to derive from.

expectations.text: Parsing happens at the API boundary function, not deferred to consumers
expectations.evidence: Line 17: apiClient.get<User>('/users/${id}') uses axios generic which is a compile-time-only assertion. No runtime parsing. response.data is trusted as User without validation.

expectations.text: Uses named export, not default export
expectations.evidence: Line 16: export async function getUserById. Named export.
